items.title: Fragrance Creators Association Names Scott Rodrigue of Procter & Gamble to Board of Directors
items.description: P&G's global fragrance innovation chief brings 35+ years of leadership; succeeds Joanna Clarke. WASHINGTON, DC / ACCESS Newswire / September 3, 2025 / Fragrance Creators Association (FCA) today announced the appointment of Scott Rodrigue, Chief R&D ...

items.title: WeightWatchers Advances International Growth With Strategic Leadership Appointment
items.author: Tara Comonte
items.description: WeightWatchers appointed Alejandro Bethlen as Executive Vice President, International, to drive global growth and innovation. Bethlen brings extensive experience from Zooplus, Amazon, and other consumer-focused companies to expand the company's international presence.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is expanding leadership team, investing in international growth, and bringing in experienced executive to drive strategic initiatives
Merely referenced as previous workplace of Alejandro Bethlen
Briefly noted as Bethlen's early career employer

items.title: WeightWatchers treibt internationales Wachstum mit strategischer Verstärkung im Führungsteam voran
items.author: Alejandro Bethlen
items.description: WeightWatchers appointed Alejandro Bethlen as Executive Vice President International to lead global expansion and innovation, leveraging his extensive experience in global business development across consumer and e-commerce sectors.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is strategically expanding leadership, investing in talent, and focusing on global growth with an experienced executive
Merely noted as a past workplace for Bethlen, no substantive company-specific discussion
Only referenced as Bethlen's early career starting point

items.title: Rhodes Convenience Stores names new COO
items.description: Robert Cisneros joins the Missouri-based c-store from Procter & Gamble, where he held a variety of operations and leadership roles for 29 years.
